name: Spinach-Cheese Puffs
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Parsley, beet, or salad greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the spinach and squeeze out excess moisture with paper towels.
2. In a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat, combine Milk, Margarine or butter, and Salt until the butter melts and mixture comes to a boil. Remove from heat.
3. Using a wooden spoon, quickly stir in Flour all at once until the mixture forms a ball and leaves the side of the saucepan.
4. Add Eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition, until the mixture is smooth and glossy.
5. Stir in Gruyere or Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese, and chopped spinach.
6. If not baking immediately, cover the surface of the mixture with plastic wrap and refrigerate.
7. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
8. Lightly grease two large cookie sheets.
9. Drop batter by level tablespoons onto the cookie sheets, about 1 1/2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 15-20 minutes until cheese puffs are golden brown.
11. Arrange appetizers on a platter and serve immediately.
Makes 4 dozen cheese puffs.
